title: Cryptographic Sorting
description: Group anagrams together from a list of strings
story: The megacorp's cryptographic database stores words in scrambled form. You need to group all anagrams to decode the hidden pattern in their encryption.
mission: Group the scrambled words by their anagram families.
output_spec: Groups of anagrams, one group per line

examples.input: eat tea tan ate nat bat
examples.output:
eat tea ate
tan nat
bat

visible_tests.input: eat tea tan ate nat bat
visible_tests.expected_output:
eat tea ate
tan nat
bat

hints.content: Sort characters in each word to create a key
Use a hashmap to group by sorted key
Remember to preserve original words in output
